headline: Gen to Announce Fiscal 2026 Fourth Quarter and Full-Year Results on May 7, 2026
summary: TEMPE, Ariz. and PRAGUE, April 13, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Gen Digital Inc. today announced that its fiscal 2026 fourth quarter and full-year financial results will be released Thursday, May 7, 2026,...

headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Gen Digital, Lowers Price Target to $26
summary: Barclays  analyst Saket Kalia   maintains Gen Digital (NASDAQ:GEN) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $32 to $26.
